word: H5371 - נֵרְגַּל שַׁרְאֶצֶר - Nêrᵉgal Sharʼetser - nare-gal' shar-eh'-tser - Nergal-sharezer

sections.paragraph:
Original: נרגּל שׁראצר

Transliteration: nêrgal shar'etser

Phonetic: nare-gal' shar-eh'-tser

BDB Definition:

Nergal-sharezer = "prince of fire"
  1. chief soothsayer and a ruler in the army of Nebuchadnezzar

Origin: from H5370 and H8272

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
